name: slack-context-bot
description: Slack Socket Mode bot with OpenAI Responses API and vector store file search.

scripts.test: node --check app.js && node --check lib/reporting.js && node --check lib/f3nation-api.js && node --check lib/health-status.js && node --check lib/bot-tuning.js && node --check scripts/rag-setup.js && node --check scripts/export-youtube.js && node --check scripts/sync-reporting-db.js && node --check scripts/query-reporting-db.js && node --check scripts/search-interactions.js && node --check scripts/ask-reporting.js && node --check scripts/ask-bot.js && node --check scripts/healthcheck.js && node scripts/check-reporting-intents.js && bash -n scripts/*.sh
